positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~from(marvin,earth)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    extraterrestrial(marvin)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    ~from(marvin,mars)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~from(X0,earth) | ~highly_intelligent(X0) | human(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~alien(X0) | extraterrestrial(X0)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~alien(marvin)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~human(X0) | ~extraterrestrial(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~from(X0,mars) | alien(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    highly_intelligent(marvin)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
